content: Thanks for calling Jessica Martinez's office, this is Sarah — how can I help you?
Hi, I saw your listing on Bayshore Boulevard and wanted to ask about it.
Great, the Bayshore listing. Are you looking to buy, or just getting a feel for the area?
Looking to buy. We've been searching in South Tampa for a few weeks.
Perfect. Is it mainly that Bayshore home, or a few in the area you're weighing?
That one mostly, but we're flexible. Three bedrooms, ideally with a yard.
Got it — three-bed with a yard in South Tampa. How soon are you hoping to move?
Pretty soon, honestly. Our lease is up at the end of next month.
Okay, that's a real timeline. Are you working with another agent right now?
No, not yet — that's kind of why I'm calling.
Happy to help. Have you talked to a lender about financing, or are you paying cash?
We're pre-approved. We sorted that out a couple weeks ago.
That's great — it puts you in a strong position. Can I grab your name?
It's Mike Reynolds.
Thanks Mike. And the best number to reach you?
And an email for the property details and your confirmation?
It's mike dot reynolds at gmail dot com.
Perfect. Jessica would love to walk you through the Bayshore home — today at 4 PM, or tomorrow at 10 AM?
Today at 4 works great.
You're booked with Jessica for today at 4 PM — you'll get a text confirmation shortly. Talk soon, Mike!
Great, thanks so much!
